payload.description:
Investigate and fix failing test: plexus/scores/LangGraphScore_test.py::test_cost_calculation_across_model_providers.

Observed: get_accumulated_costs now calls litellm.cost_per_token with a MagicMock model value from node parameters instead of the configured model string, causing assertion failure in CI/develop.

Done criteria:
- Root cause identified
- Minimal fix applied
- Target test passes locally
payload.title: Fix LangGraphScore cost calculation test regression
